violations.text: Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. The last date of sale was lacking on various tags. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The flip top prep unit at the cookline was observed in poor repair (torn gasket). Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Various food items in the cook line prep units were observed held at 42 to 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. (See temperatures) PIC voluntary disposed of food items without suggestion at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

Gaskets to the Fry Prep Unit in the cookline area were in poor repair. Gaskets were observed to be torn and not sealing properly. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

The shelving brackets in the dish washing area has an accumulation of dust and soil debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The following areas in the physical facilities are in poor repair... - Mop sink door was observed to be splintering and peeling - Dry storage shelving sealed coating was observed to be worn exposing bare wood to possible spill/moisture The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
